modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to find link to access Banner HR Finance in SNAP.

full_description_text: 
El usuario está tratando de acceder a Banner HR Finance a través de MyU Portal, pero no puede encontrar el enlace en SNAP. Esto le impide acceder a la información que necesita. Es importante resolver este problema para que el usuario pueda continuar con sus tareas.
